Upload stiched motion file to common pool

nodes.name: check for number of motion videos to stich
Call 'video render v1' for motion videos stiching

parameters.fileSelector: =/tmp/{{ $('Limit').item.json.name }}_motion_count_{{ $('check for number of motion videos to stich').item.json.data.StoryShots.motionURLs.length }}.mp4

nodes.name: Upload stiched motion file to common pool

parameters.name: ={{ $('Limit').item.json.name }}_motion_count_{{ $('check for number of motion videos to stich').item.json.data.StoryShots.motionURLs.length }}.mp4

parameters.command: =/tmp/{{ $('Limit').item.json.name }}_motion_count_{{ $('check for number of motion videos to stich').item.json.data.StoryShots.motionURLs.length }}.mp4

nodes.name: Set shot number with motion video link

assignments.name: Shot_no
assignments.value: ={{ $('check for number of motion videos to stich').item.json.shot_num }}

assignments.name: image_link
assignments.value: ={{ $('check for number of motion videos to stich').item.json.webContentLink }}

nodes.name: Mege for all shots and their motion video links
Loop Over Reels
nodes.notes: Processes one reel at a time. Error on any reel marks it and continues to next.
